scripts.bootstrap-admin: pnpm --filter @meditation/core build && pnpm --filter @meditation/database build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && node dist/commands/bootstrap-admin.js
scripts.sync-prompts: pnpm --filter @meditation/core build && pnpm --filter @meditation/database build && tsx src/commands/sync-prompts.ts
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @meditation/core build && pnpm --filter @meditation/database build && tsx watch src/main.ts
